privileged_info_summary: The task operates on a synthetic student record for Jason Miller (Grade 10) with a photo file created at /home/ga/Documents/jason_miller.jpg. The photo accepts jpg, jpeg, png, or gif formats. The OpenSIS system is accessed at http://localhost/opensis using admin credentials (username: admin, password: Admin@123). All data including the student record, credentials, and photo file are generated by the task setup script, not from external data sources.
